---
name: Doyeon (Doy)
surname: Kim
position: "Ph.D. Candidate · Learning Sciences · Educational Technology"
address: "\\#958 Educational Sciences, 1025 W. Johnson St., Madison, WI 53706"
email: "doy.kim@wisc.edu"
linkedin: "doy-kim"
github: "doy-kim-research"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %Y')`"
output:
  vitae::awesomecv:
    page_total: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(vitae)
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(readr)

# Helper: split a semicolon-delimited string into a character vector.
# Returns NULL for NA or empty strings (suppresses the bullet entirely).
split_semi <- function(x) {
  map(x, ~ {
    if (is.na(.x) || .x == "") return(NULL)
    str_split(.x, ";\\s*")[[1]]
  })
}
```

# Education

```{r education}
read_csv("data/education.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(why = split_semi(details)) %>%
  detailed_entries(
    what  = degree,
    when  = when,
    with  = institution,
    where = location,
    why   = why
  )
```

# Research Projects and Professional Experience

```{r positions}
positions    <- read_csv("data/positions.csv",        show_col_types = FALSE)
pos_details  <- read_csv("data/position_details.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# Build a list-column of formatted detail strings per position.
# Project names (when present) are rendered in italics as a label prefix.
detail_lists <- pos_details %>%
  mutate(
    formatted = if_else(
      !is.na(project) & project != "",
      paste0("\\textit{", project, "}: ", detail),
      detail
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(position_id) %>%
  summarise(why = list(formatted), .groups = "drop")

positions %>%
  left_join(detail_lists, by = c("id" = "position_id")) %>%
  detailed_entries(
    what  = role,
    when  = when,
    with  = organization,
    where = location,
    why   = why
  )
```

# Publications

## Peer-Reviewed

```{r peer-reviewed}
bibliography_entries("data/publications_peer.bib") %>%
  arrange(desc(issued))
```

## Other

```{r other-publications}
bibliography_entries("data/publications_other.bib") %>%
  arrange(desc(issued))
```

# Awards, Fellowships & Honors

```{r awards}
read_csv("data/awards.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  brief_entries(
    what = award,
    when = when,
    with = institution
  )
```

# Skills

```{r skills}
read_csv("data/skills.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  summarise(skills_list = paste(skill, collapse = " · "), .groups = "drop") %>%
  brief_entries(
    what = skills_list,
    with = category
  )
```

# Leadership, Mentoring & Service

## Research Mentorship

```{r mentorship}
read_csv("data/service.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(category == "Research Mentorship") %>%
  mutate(why = split_semi(description)) %>%
  detailed_entries(
    what  = role,
    when  = when,
    with  = organization,
    why   = why
  )
```

## Peer Review

```{r peer-review}
read_csv("data/service.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(category == "Peer Review") %>%
  brief_entries(
    what = organization,
    when = when
  )
```

## Committee Service

```{r committee-service}
read_csv("data/service.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(category == "Committee Service") %>%
  mutate(why = split_semi(description)) %>%
  detailed_entries(
    what  = role,
    when  = when,
    with  = organization,
    why   = why
  )
```

## Presentations & Workshops

```{r presentations}
read_csv("data/service.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(category == "Presentations") %>%
  mutate(why = split_semi(description)) %>%
  brief_entries(
    what = role,
    when = when,
    with = organization
  )
```

## Panel Discussions

```{r panels}
read_csv("data/service.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(category == "Panel Discussions") %>%
  mutate(why = split_semi(description)) %>%
  brief_entries(
    what = role,
    when = when,
    with = organization
  )
```
